package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for mutable_package_global: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Package-level variables that are mutated from function bodies instead of kept immutable.
type CaseMutablePackageGlobalDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMutablePackageGlobalModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMutablePackageGlobalRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMutablePackageGlobalModel
}

type CaseMutablePackageGlobalService struct {
    repo *CaseMutablePackageGlobalRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMutablePackageGlobalAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

var globalState = map[string]string{}

func PositiveMutablePackageGlobal(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMutablePackageGlobalDTO) error {
    focus := "mutable_package_global"
    _ = focus
    globalState[input] = "mutated"
    mutable_package_global_positive := map[string]int{"mutable": 1, "package": 2, "global": 3}
    mutable_package_global_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mutable_positive_0 := mutable_package_global_positive["mutable"] + len(input)
    _ = mutable_positive_0
    package_positive_1 := mutable_package_global_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_1
    global_positive_2 := mutable_package_global_positive["global"] + len(input)
    _ = global_positive_2
    return nil
}
